claim_bullets.bullet_text: Some languages support multiple return values: A function can return several things at once, like a value and an error code. (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.106-107)
This can easily be emulated in JavaScript with destructuring. (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.106-107)
In JavaScript, a function can return multiple values using destructuring. (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.106-107)

source_record_text: This chapter discusses how some languages support multiple return values, and how this can be emulated in JavaScript using destructuring.
